label: Current Studio MCP toolbox baseline; observation only, no operating-system policy enabled.

cases.description: Edit a story room with a narrow patch and validate the flow.
Reject a story patch when its preimage no longer matches.
Repair a bounded Go runtime defect and run its focused regression test.
Detect a runtime edit attempted from the wrong repository root.
Explain a route surprise from recorded trace events.
Locate a swallowed host-call error in bounded trace evidence.
Classify a stalled turn from its last recorded events.
Update an MCP guide example and verify its tool names.
Record the current toolbox shell-escape exposure in a documentation task.
Create and bootstrap a managed clone-backed workspace.
Patch, status, and commit inside the selected managed workspace.
Record the current toolbox path-containment gap for a symlink escape attempt.
